summary: Added receipt image thumbnail rendering to the dashboard table. Created a ReceiptImagePreview component that observes the DOM after the data-table renders and replaces the plain-text URL links in the 'Receipt Image' column with actual thumbnails. Clicking a thumbnail opens a full-screen lightbox modal showing the full-resolution image (or an iframe for PDFs). The modal can be closed via the Escape key, clicking outside, or the close button. Rows without images show a '--' placeholder. The component uses a MutationObserver to handle dynamic row additions and re-renders.
issues: Pre-existing build error in src/app/app/page.tsx:257 (onRetryClassification prop does not exist on ReceiptUploaderProps) - unrelated to this task. All new/modified files compile without errors.
notes: The data-table library (@marlinjai/data-table-react) does not support custom cell renderers, so a DOM-based approach using MutationObserver was used to transform the Receipt Image column cells from URL text into image thumbnails. The component detects the column index of 'Receipt Image', finds the corresponding cells in the table, and replaces .dt-cell-url content with elements. For PDFs (URLs ending in /thumbnail), the lightbox opens the full file URL in an iframe. For regular images, it displays the full-resolution image directly.
